name: Spicey Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup Milk and 1/2 teaspoon Vanilla in a bowl.
2. Add the melted butter to the milk mixture and stir until combined.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, sugar, salt, cocoa, cinnamon, cloves) to the wet mixture, stirring just until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Sprinkle half a cup of firmly packed brown sugar and half a cup of white sugar over the top of the batter.
6. Pour 1 cup cold water over the entire mixture.
7. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes or until the top is firm to the touch.
From the book "Treasured Mennonite Recipes" from the Mennonite Community Relief Sales, Volume One AR/93
